column1: -- Step 1: Identify all contract accounts (including deployed contracts)
-- Step 2: Identify all user accounts (any account NOT a contract)
WHERE account_id NOT IN (SELECT account_id FROM contract_accounts)
WHEN ta.signer_account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM user_accounts)
AND ta.receiver_account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM contract_accounts) THEN 'U2C'
WHEN ta.signer_account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM contract_accounts)
AND ta.receiver_account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM user_accounts) THEN 'C2U'
WHEN ta.signer_account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM contract_accounts)
AND ta.receiver_account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM contract_accounts) THEN 'C2C'
WHEN ta.signer_account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM user_accounts)
AND ta.receiver_account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM user_accounts) THEN 'U2U'
